tagline: Atomadic Fuse SDK seed logic-base. T0 schemas + T1 examples + T2 composites. ~50-70 blocks. Bootstrap `fuse init`, then harvest your own code.
note: After `fuse init`, run `fuse harvest <repo>` to grow your own private store. The full ecosystem store lives on fuse.atomadic.tech (hosted) or via the kernel binary (private).
